## What this changes
Brief description of the change and why.

## Type
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist
- [ ] Tested locally (collector dry-run, `wrangler dev`, or browser check)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials in the diff
- [ ] `wrangler.toml` database_id is correct if schema changed
